title: Most and least shorted industrial stocks with up to $2B market cap
content:
Short interest in mid-February was spread broadly across the industrial sector, with no single industry emerging as a clear standout or dominating in terms of positioning.

HERE ARE THE FIVE MOST SHORTED INDUSTRIAL STOCKS WITH MARKET CAPITALIZATIONS OF UP TO $2 BILLION (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING)

SU Group Holdings (SUGP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SUGP]), Short Interest: 28.95%.

NANO Nuclear Energy (NNE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NNE]), Short Interest: 25.10%.

Enovix (ENVX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ENVX]), Short Interest: 24.88%.

3D Systems (DDD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DDD]), Short Interest: 23.32%.

Virgin Galactic Holdings (SPCE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SPCE]), Short Interest: 21.83%.

HERE ARE THE FIVE LEAST SHORTED INDUSTRIAL STOCKS WITH MARKET CAPITALIZATIONS OF UP TO $2 BILLION: (AS A % OF SHARES OUTSTANDING)

Ozop Energy Solutions (OZSCD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OZSCD]), Short Interest: 0.55%.

Fuel Tech (FTEK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FTEK]), Short Interest: 0.55%.

Galaxy Payroll Group (GLXG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GLXG]), Short Interest: 0.55%.

Enigmatig (EGG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EGG]), Short Interest: 0.52%.

Costamare Bulkers Holdings (CMDB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMDB]), Short Interest: 0.52%.
